title: ANC - Both modes disabled, turn on Transparency, default value selected
scenario: Transparency Mode defaults to Environment sub-setting when enabled while ANC is disabled
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure ANC Mode is set to Off
Ensure Transparency Mode is set to Off
Observe the Transparency Mode sub-setting that is selected
expected: Transparency Mode turns on and defaults to the "Environment" sub-setting. ANC Mode remains disabled (Off).
